testcase.name: shouldGetActiveCartByCustomerId

enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists cart_items cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists carts cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists categories cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists customer_addresses cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists customer_email_verification_tokens cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists customers cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists merchant_addresses cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists merchants cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists product_images cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists product_tags cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists products cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists thai_amphures cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists thai_provinces cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists thai_tumbons cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists users cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists wishlist_items cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists wishlists cascade Hibernate: create table cart_items ( item_order_index integer not null, line_total numeric(12,2) not null, quantity integer not null, unit_price numeric(12,2) not null, cart_id bigint not null, cart_item_id bigint, product_id bigint not null, sku varchar(100) not null, thumbnail_url varchar(1000), product_name varchar(255) not null, primary key (item_order_index, cart_id) ) Hibernate: create table carts ( discount_amount numeric(12,2) not null, subtotal numeric(12,2) not null, total_amount numeric(12,2) not null, total_items integer not null, created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, customer_id varchar(255), status enum ('ABANDONED','ACTIVE','CHECKED_OUT') not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table categories ( sort_order integer not null, created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, parent_id bigint, updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, image_url varchar(1000), description TEXT, name varchar(255) not null, slug varchar(255) not null, status enum ('ACTIVE','ARCHIVED','INACTIVE') not null, primary key (id), constraint uk_categories_slug unique (slug) ) Hibernate: create table customer_addresses ( address_order_index integer not null, country_code varchar(2) not null, is_default boolean not null, address_id bigint, created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, thai_amphure_code varchar(20) not null, thai_province_code varchar(20) not null, thai_tumbon_code varchar(20), recipient_phone varchar(50) not null, label varchar(100), customer_id varchar(255) not null, line1 varchar(255) not null, line2 varchar(255), recipient_name varchar(255) not null, primary key (address_order_index, customer_id) ) Hibernate: create table customer_email_verification_tokens ( created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, expires_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, used_at timestamp(6) with time zone, token_hash varchar(64) not null unique, customer_id varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table customers ( date_of_birth date, is_email_verified boolean not null, is_phone_verified boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, phone_number varchar(50), first_name varchar(100) not null, last_name varchar(100) not null, display_name varchar(150), email varchar(255) not null, id varchar(255) not null, gender enum ('FEMALE','MALE','OTHER','PREFER_NOT_TO_SAY'), status enum ('ACTIVE','INACTIVE','PENDING_VERIFICATION','SUSPENDED') not null, primary key (id), constraint uk_customers_email unique (email), constraint uk_customers_phone_number unique (phone_number) ) Hibernate: create table merchant_addresses ( address_order_index integer not null, country_code varchar(2) not null, is_default boolean not null, address_id bigint, created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, thai_amphure_code varchar(20) not null, thai_province_code varchar(20) not null, thai_tumbon_code varchar(20), recipient_phone varchar(50), line1 varchar(255) not null, line2 varchar(255), merchant_id varchar(255) not null, recipient_name varchar(255), address_type enum ('BILLING','OFFICE','RETURN','WAREHOUSE') not null, primary key (address_order_index, merchant_id) ) Hibernate: create table merchants ( commission_rate numeric(7,2), currency varchar(3), is_official boolean not null, rating_average numeric(4,2), registered_country varchar(2), created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, verified_at timestamp(6) with time zone, phone_number varchar(50), support_phone varchar(50), tax_id varchar(50), merchant_code varchar(100) not null, cover_image_url varchar(1000), logo_url varchar(1000), description TEXT, email varchar(255), id varchar(255) not null, legal_name varchar(255), shop_name varchar(255) not null, shop_slug varchar(255) not null, support_email varchar(255), business_type enum ('BRAND_OWNER','COMPANY','DISTRIBUTOR','INDIVIDUAL'), status enum ('ACTIVE','INACTIVE','PENDING_APPROVAL','REJECTED','SUSPENDED') not null, primary key (id), constraint uk_merchants_code unique (merchant_code), constraint uk_merchants_shop_slug unique (shop_slug), constraint uk_merchants_email unique (email), constraint uk_merchants_tax_id unique (tax_id) ) Hibernate: create table product_images ( image_order_index integer not null, is_primary boolean, sort_order integer not null, image_id bigint, product_id bigint not null, alt_text varchar(500), image_url varchar(1000) not null, primary key (image_order_index, product_id) ) Hibernate: create table product_tags ( tag_order_index integer not null, product_id bigint not null, tag_value varchar(100) not null, primary key (tag_order_index, product_id) ) Hibernate: create table products ( currency varchar(3) not null, in_stock boolean not null, is_featured boolean not null, price numeric(12,2) not null, stock_quantity integer not null, category_id bigint, created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, brand varchar(100), sku varchar(100) not null, short_description varchar(500), thumbnail_url varchar(1000), description TEXT, merchant_id varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, slug varchar(255) not null, status enum ('ACTIVE','ARCHIVED','DRAFT','INACTIVE','OUT_OF_STOCK') not null, primary key (id), constraint uk_products_sku unique (sku), constraint uk_products_slug unique (slug) ) Hibernate: create table thai_amphures ( code varchar(20) not null, thai_province_code varchar(20) not null, name_en varchar(150), name_th varchar(150) not null, primary key (code) ) Hibernate: create table thai_provinces ( code varchar(20) not null, name_en varchar(150), name_th varchar(150) not null, primary key (code) ) Hibernate: create table thai_tumbons ( code varchar(20) not null, postal_code varchar(20), thai_amphure_code varchar(20) not null, name_en varchar(150), name_th varchar(150) not null, primary key (code) ) Hibernate: create table users ( created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, customer_id varchar(32) not null, email varchar(255) not null, id varchar(255) not null, password_hash varchar(255) not null, status enum ('ACTIVE','INACTIVE','PENDING_VERIFICATION','SUSPENDED') not null, primary key (id), constraint uk_users_customer_id unique (customer_id), constraint uk_users_email unique (email) ) Hibernate: create table wishlist_items ( currency varchar(3) not null, item_order_index integer not null, price numeric(12,2) not null, added_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, product_id bigint not null, wishlist_id bigint not null, wishlist_item_id bigint, sku varchar(100) not null, thumbnail_url varchar(1000), product_name varchar(255) not null, primary key (item_order_index, wishlist_id) ) Hibernate: create table wishlists ( created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, customer_id varchar(32) not null, primary key (id), constraint uk_wishlists_customer_id unique (customer_id) ) Hibernate: create index idx_customer_email_verification_tokens_customer on customer_email_verification_tokens (customer_id) Hibernate: alter table if exists cart_items add constraint FKpcttvuq4mxppo8sxggjtn5i2c foreign key (cart_id) references carts Hibernate: alter table if exists customer_addresses add constraint FKrvr6wl9gll7u98cda18smugp4 foreign key (customer_id) references customers Hibernate: alter table if exists merchant_addresses add constraint products Hibernate: alter table if exists product_tags add constraint FK5rk6s19k3risy7q7wqdr41uss foreign key (product_id) references products Hibernate: alter table if exists wishlist_items add constraint FKkem9l8vd14pk3cc4elnpl0n00 foreign key (wishlist_id) references wishlists 2026-04-15T22:52:35.985+07:00 INFO 26191 --- [carbonedge-api] [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : testcase.name: customerShouldHaveOnlyOneActiveCart
